narrative:
Canton City 3-B (precinct in Stark County) has 436 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.7 percentage points.
